revision.text:
'''壬辰'''（みずのえたつ、じんしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて29番目で、前は[[辛卯]]、次は[[癸巳]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は水、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬辰の年==
==壬辰の日== ===[[選日]]=== 壬辰の日は[[十方暮]]の9日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings

'''壬辰'''（みずのえたつ、じんしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて29番目で、前は[[辛卯]]、次は[[癸巳]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は水、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬辰の年== *[[1592年]]の[[文禄の役]]は、朝鮮では壬辰倭乱と呼ばれる。
==壬辰の日== ===[[選日]]=== 壬辰の日は[[十方暮]]の9日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''壬辰'''（みずのえたつ、じんすいのたつ、じんしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの29番目で、前は[[辛卯]]、次は[[癸巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って32が余る年が壬辰の[[年]]となる。
すなわち、西暦N(N>0)年が壬辰の年であれば、
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math>
である。
ここで、記号 <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> は、[[床関数]]である。
{| class="wikitable" |+'''壬辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[32年]] *[[92年]] *[[152年]] *[[212年]] *[[272年]] *[[332年]] *[[392年]] *[[452年]] *[[512年]] *[[572年]] *[[632年]] *[[692年]] *[[752年]] *[[812年]] *[[872年]] *[[932年]] *[[992年]] | *[[1052年]] *[[1112年]] *[[1172年]] *[[1232年]] *[[1292年]] *[[1352年]] *[[1412年]] *[[1472年]] *[[1532年]] *[[1592年]] *[[1652年]] *[[1712年]] *[[1772年]] *[[1832年]] *[[1892年]] *[[1952年]] | *[[2012年]] *[[2072年]] *[[2132年]] *[[2192年]] *[[2252年]] *[[2312年]] *[[2372年]] *[[2432年]] *[[2492年]] *[[2552年]] *[[2612年]] *[[2672年]] *[[2732年]] *[[2792年]] *[[2852年]] *[[2912年]] *[[2972年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[文禄]]元(1592)年の[[文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|文禄の役]]は、朝鮮では壬辰倭乱と呼ばれる。
==壬辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[3月]]が壬辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬辰の日== 壬辰の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 壬辰の日は[[十方暮]]の9日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:壬辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:壬辰]]

干支の組み合わせの29番目で、前は[[辛卯]]、次は[[癸巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って32が余る年が壬辰の[[年]]となる。
すなわち、西暦N(N>0)年が壬辰の年であれば、
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math>
である。
ここで、記号 <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> は、[[床関数]]である。
{| class="wikitable" |+'''壬辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[32年]] *[[92年]] *[[152年]] *[[212年]] *[[272年]] *[[332年]] *[[392年]] *[[452年]] *[[512年]] *[[572年]] *[[632年]] *[[692年]] *[[752年]] *[[812年]] *[[872年]] *[[932年]] *[[992年]] | *[[1052年]] *[[1112年]] *[[1172年]] *[[1232年]] *[[1292年]] *[[1352年]] *[[1412年]] *[[1472年]] *[[1532年]] *[[1592年]] *[[1652年]] *[[1712年]] *[[1772年]] *[[1832年]] *[[1892年]] *[[1952年]] | *[[2012年]] *[[2072年]] *[[2132年]] *[[2192年]] *[[2252年]] *[[2312年]] *[[2372年]] *[[2432年]] *[[2492年]] *[[2552年]] *[[2612年]] *[[2672年]] *[[2732年]] *[[2792年]] *[[2852年]] *[[2912年]] *[[2972年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[文禄]]元(1592)年の[[文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|文禄の役]]は、朝鮮では壬辰倭乱と呼ばれる。
==壬辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[3月]]が壬辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬辰の日== 壬辰の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 壬辰の日は[[十方暮]]の9日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:壬辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:壬辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:new pages]] [[ja:壬辰]]

Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの29番目で、前は[[辛卯]]、次は[[癸巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って32が余る年が壬辰の[[年]]となる。
すなわち、西暦N(N>0)年が壬辰の年であれば、
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math>
である。
ここで、記号 <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> は、[[床関数]]である。

==壬辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[3月]]が壬辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''壬辰'''（みずのえたつ、じんすいのたつ、じんしん）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの29番目で、前は[[辛卯]]、次は[[癸巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って32が余る年が壬辰の[[年]]となる。
すなわち、西暦N(N>0)年が壬辰の年であれば、
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math>
である。
ここで、記号 <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> は、[[床関数]]である。

==壬辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[3月]]が壬辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

==壬辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[3月]]が壬辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬辰の日== 壬辰の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 壬辰の日は[[十方暮]]の9日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Dragon-qq]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:壬辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:壬辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Dragon-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:壬辰]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Water Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Water Dragon]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dragon|kanji=壬辰|romaji=mizunoe tatsu|onyomi=jishin|p=rénchén|w=jen-ch'en|mi=ʐən³⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=jam4 san4|j=jam4 san4|ci=jɐm sɐn|mc=ɲiɪm ɖin|oc-bs=ɲɨm ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Water Dragon also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 壬辰'''（みずのえたつ、じんすいのたつ、じんしん）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの29番目で、前は[[辛卯]]、次は[[癸巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って32が余る年が壬辰の[[年]]となる。
すなわち、西暦N(N>0)年が壬辰の年であれば、
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math>
である。
ここで、記号 <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> は、[[床関数]]である。

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dragon|kanji=壬辰|romaji=mizunoe tatsu|onyomi=jishin|p=rénchén|w=jen-ch'en|mi=ʐən³⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=jam4 san4|j=jam4 san4|ci=jɐm sɐn|mc=ɲiɪm ɖin|oc-bs=ɲɨm ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Water Dragon also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 壬辰'''（みずのえたつ、じんすいのたつ、じんしん）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの29番目で、前は[[辛卯]]、次は[[癸巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って32が余る年が壬辰の[[年]]となる。
すなわち、西暦N(N>0)年が壬辰の年であれば、
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math>
である。
ここで、記号 <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> は、[[床関数]]である。

==壬辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[3月]]が壬辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬辰の日== 壬辰の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 壬辰の日は[[十方暮]]の9日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dragon|kanji=壬辰|romaji=mizunoe tatsu|onyomi=jishin|p=rénchén|w=jen-ch'en|mi=ʐən³⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=jam4 san4|j=jam4 san4|ci=jɐm sɐn|mc=ɲiɪm ɖin|oc-bs=ɲɨm ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Water Dragon also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 壬辰'''（みずのえたつ、じんすいのたつ、じんしん）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの29番目で、前は[[辛卯]]、次は[[癸巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って32が余る年が壬辰の[[年]]となる。
すなわち、西暦N(N>0)年が壬辰の年であれば、
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math>
である。
ここで、記号 <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> は、[[床関数]]である。
{| class="wikitable" |+'''壬辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[32年]] *[[92年]] *[[152年]] *[[212年]] *[[272年]] *[[332年]] *[[392年]] *[[452年]] *[[512年]] *[[572年]] *[[632年]] *[[692年]] *[[752年]] *[[812年]] *[[872年]] *[[932年]] *[[992年]] | *[[1052年]] *[[1112年]] *[[1172年]] *[[1232年]] *[[1292年]] *[[1352年]] *[[1412年]] *[[1472年]] *[[1532年]] *[[1592年]] *[[1652年]] *[[1712年]] *[[1772年]] *[[1832年]] *[[1892年]] *[[1952年]] | *[[2012年]] *[[2072年]] *[[2132年]] *[[2192年]] *[[2252年]] *[[2312年]] *[[2372年]] *[[2432年]] *[[2492年]] *[[2552年]] *[[2612年]] *[[2672年]] *[[2732年]] *[[2792年]] *[[2852年]] *[[2912年]] *[[2972年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[文禄]]元(1592)年の[[文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|文禄の役]]は、朝鮮では壬辰倭乱と呼ばれる。
==壬辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[3月]]が壬辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬辰の日== 壬辰の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 壬辰の日は[[十方暮]]の9日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Dragon-qq]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:壬辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dragon|kanji=壬辰|romaji=mizunoe tatsu|onyomi=jishin|p=rénchén|w=jen-ch'en|mi=ʐən³⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=jam4 san4|j=jam4 san4|ci=jɐm sɐn|mc=ɲiɪm ɖin|oc-bs=ɲɨm ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Water Dragon also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 壬辰'''（みずのえたつ、じんすいのたつ、じんしん）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの29番目で、前は[[辛卯]]、次は[[癸巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って32が余る年が壬辰の[[年]]となる。
すなわち、西暦N(N>0)年が壬辰の年であれば、
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math>
である。
ここで、記号 <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> は、[[床関数]]である。

Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[sn:ang Water Dragon]] [[ja:壬辰]][[zh:壬辰]][[ko:임진]][[fr:Dragon de eau]][[de:Wasser-Drache]] [[af:Wateraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Yîm-cṳ̄de]][[de:Wasser-Affeneen]][[en:Fire Monkey]][[fr:Singe de feushak]][[it:Bing-chṳ́id]][[sn:ingyinja]][[ko:병신]][[nds:Holt-Affenvi]][[vi:Bính Thân]][[za:Bingceij]][[zh-min-nan:Pêng-chún]][[zh-yue:丙申]][[zh:丙申]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dragon|kanji=壬辰|romaji=mizunoe tatsu|onyomi=jishin|p=rénchén|w=jen-ch'en|mi=ʐən³⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=jam4 san4|j=jam4 san4|ci=jɐm sɐn|mc=ɲiɪm ɖin|oc-bs=ɲɨm ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Water Dragon also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 壬辰'''（みずのえたつ、じんすいのたつ、じんしん）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの29番目で、前は[[辛卯]]、次は[[癸巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[壬]]は陽の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==壬辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って32が余る年が壬辰の[[年]]となる。
すなわち、西暦N(N>0)年が壬辰の年であれば、
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math>[[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]]
である。
ここで、記号 <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> は、[[床関数]]である。
{| class="wikitable" |+'''壬辰の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[32年]] *[[92年]] *[[152年]] *[[212年]] *[[272年]] *[[332年]] *[[392年]] *[[452年]] *[[512年]] *[[572年]] *[[632年]] *[[692年]] *[[752年]] *[[812年]] *[[872年]] *[[932年]] *[[992年]] | *[[1052年]] *[[1112年]] *[[1172年]] *[[1232年]] *[[1292年]] *[[1352年]] *[[1412年]] *[[1472年]] *[[1532年]] *[[1592年]] *[[1652年]] *[[1712年]] *[[1772年]] *[[1832年]] *[[1892年]] *[[1952年]] | *[[2012年]] *[[2072年]] *[[2132年]] *[[2192年]] *[[2252年]] *[[2312年]] *[[2372年]] *[[2432年]] *[[2492年]] *[[2552年]] *[[2612年]] *[[2672年]] *[[2732年]] *[[2792年]] *[[2852年]] *[[2912年]] *[[2972年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[文禄]]元(1592)年の[[文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|文禄の役]]は、朝鮮では壬辰倭乱と呼ばれる。
==壬辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[3月]]が壬辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==壬辰の日== 壬辰の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 壬辰の日は[[十方暮]]の9日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yang Water Dragon-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:壬辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:壬辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yang Water Dragon-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:壬辰]][[zh:壬辰]][[ko:임진]][[fr:Dragon de eau]][[de:Wasser-Drache]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dragon|kanji=壬辰|romaji=mizunoe tatsu|onyomi=jishin|p=rénchén|w=jen-ch'en|mi=ʐən³⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=jam4 san4|j=jam4 san4|ci=jɐm sɐn|mc=ɲiɪm ɖin|oc-bs=ɲɨm ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Dragon also known as 壬辰''' (mizu no etatsu, jinsui no tatsu, jinshin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=}}. Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Earth overcomes Water).
==Pronunciation== PronounceYang Water Dragon
==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=}}.

==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.

It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Earth overcomes Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Earth overcomes Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 床関数と天井関数}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 文禄・慶長の役}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Earth overcomes Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 床関数と天井関数}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 文禄・慶長の役}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Shihoumoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.
