===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062581]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dragon|kanji=壬辰|romaji=mizunoe tatsu|onyomi=jishin|p=rénchén|w=jen-ch'en|mi=ʐən³⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=jam4 san4|j=jam4 san4|ci=jɐm sɐn|mc=ɲiɪm ɖin|oc-bs=ɲɨm ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Dragon also known as 壬辰''' (mizu no etatsu, jinsui no tatsu, jinshin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Earth overcomes Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

[[:en:452|452 AD]] * [[:en:512|512 AD]] * [[:en:572|572 AD]] * [[:en:632|632 AD]] * [[:en:692|692 AD]] * [[:en:752|752 AD]] * [[:en:812|812 AD]] * [[:en:872|872 AD]] * [[:en:932|932 AD]] * ===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062581]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dragon|kanji=壬辰|romaji=mizunoe tatsu|onyomi=jishin|p=rénchén|w=jen-ch'en|mi=ʐən³⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=jam4 san4|j=jam4 san4|ci=jɐm sɐn|mc=ɲiɪm ɖin|oc-bs=ɲɨm ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Dragon also known as 壬辰''' (mizu no etatsu, jinsui no tatsu, jinshin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|qq=|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}}. ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Earth overcomes Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.

===Events=== * In [[:en:Bunroku|Bunroku]] 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Japanese invasions of Korea|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q576338}}.
==Months of Yang Water Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Dragon== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|WD=Q905297}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: jinshin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Water Dragon (壬辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのえたつ (mizunoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんかのたつ (jinka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): imjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Water Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then
<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math> Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q215193}}.
